name: Hemomancer
bio: He spills his own blood to drown the world in yours

skills.name: Hemoplague
skills.description: Deal Magical Damage equal to (130% of Magic Power + 150), and heal for (25% of Magic Power + 20). Also applies a permanent bleed that deals 2% of target's current HP per stack as True Damage each round. Stacks infinitely.

skills.name: Blood Rage
skills.description: Heal for (10% of Magic Power + 100), then permanently increase Magic Power by 25%. Applies a permanent self-bleed that deals 2% of current HP per stack as True Damage each round. Stacks infinitely.

skills.name: Blood Burn
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage equal to (120% of Magic Power + 120 per stack of Hemoplague bleed effect on the opponent).

skills.name: Empty Slot
skills.description: This character has no fourth ability.

ultimate.name: Grand Transfusion
ultimate.description: Heal for 100 per Blood Rage stack. Then, transfer that number of stacks to the opponent as Hemoplague. All self-stacks of Blood Rage are cleared.
